items.caption:
Some people ease back into reality. I panic-unpack because I know if that suitcase survives Day 1, it’s staying packed for the next 3-5 business months. Unfortunately, there’s no middle ground with me 😂 Anyone else the same? 
#cleaningtips #cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount #instaclean #cleaninghacks
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator

items.caption:
Am I missing anything? 😅Do you do these or is there something else you have to do before leaving?
1. I change the bin and sprinkle bicarbonate of soda in the base to absorb any smells
2. I empty the dishwasher and sprinkle bicarbonate of soda in the base
3. I make sure all the washing is done and then sprinkle bicarbonate of soda in the drum of the washing machine too but also leave the drawer and door open to air
4. I throw out any food that will go off while we’re away and wipe down the fridge
5. I tidy and wipe down the sides
6. I vacuum and mop high traffic areas so crumbs don’t invite any ants in while I’m away
7. Finally I change the bedding as fresh sheets always make coming home a little easier!
#cleaningtips #cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount #instaclean #cleaninghacks
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator
items.transcript: Some people think cleaning the house before going away is a total waste of time as we're not here to enjoy it. But there is reason behind the madness and I had a few people asking for a breakdown on my latest post. So here are my non-negotiables before I go away. Basically I make sure I don't come home to a stinky house. So first all the laundry gets done before we leave. I come back with enough washing from holiday, let alone a pile I've left sitting at home. Then I change the bins, clear out any food that'll go off and wipe down the fridge. I then vacuum and mop the floors so there's no crumbs inviting the ants in while I'm away. And finally I change the bedding because fresh sheets always make coming home that little bit easier.

items.caption:
Holiday mode = ON ✈️ but first… time to give the whole house a proper clean 🧼✨Is anyone else like this? 

There’s nothing worse than coming home to chaos so I always give the house a big reset before going away. 
.
#cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount #cleaningtips #instaclean #deepclean
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator

items.caption:
What do you think?! This is the first project we’ve started in the new house 🙌🏼 With the heatwave at the moment we wanted to focus on the outside seeing as we’re basically living in the garden at this point!☀️So we turned an empty corner into an Ibizan inspired little escape and I love it! There’s still finishing touches I’d like to add but I’m so pleased with it so far. If anyone knows where I can get a couple of olive trees for a decent price please let me know in the comments 🥰 
.
#gardeninspo #gardenfurniture  #gardensofa #gardentransformation #outdoorlivingspace
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator
items.transcript: It's day one of Project Garden and we're attempting to turn this empty corner into an Ibethan inspired little escape and I am so excited because our furniture arrived and it is perfect. I got Sean straight out to build it and the next day was all about styling. I added a gorgeous rug, a mirror, some lanterns and a few terracotta pots. The big one is still empty because I'm on the hunt for an olive tree that's a decent price so if anyone has seen one then please let me know. But this is how it's looking so far. I absolutely love it. Let me know what you think.

items.transcript: No one can prepare you for just how much mess comes with motherhood, and little moments like these have happened more times than I can count, and I am sure I'm not the only one. I swear I spend half my life cleaning something up, and just when you think you've caught up, there's another spill or another stain. And honestly, this little machine has saved me more times than I can count. It's the Shark Stain Striker, and it has saved my carpets, my sofas, and honestly, my sanity. Because although the daily messes are very much out of our control, it is nice to feel like you've got some sort of backup.

items.caption:
Who else is excited about a bit of heat this weekend?! 🙌🏼☀️🔥 Let’s call this part 1 of getting the garden ready for summer. It’s a very blank canvas at the moment, so I can’t wait to add some personality! What would you add? I’m thinking olive trees, cosy lighting, maybe even a bbq area eventually. I can’t wait to show you our garden furniture we’ve ordered and finally be able to use this space! 🙌🏼 I hope you all have a lovely bank holiday weekend! ❤️ 
.
#gardencleanup #pressurewashing #cleaningmotivation #instaclean #gardencleaning

items.caption:
15-20 minute creamy tomato pasta that needs minimal effort 🙌🏼 Another easy recipe I kept seeing and had to share with you! So simple and so good! Perfect for those days where you need to cook but you have little energy to 🫶🏼 Save to refer back to and send to someone who appreciates quick dinner ideas too ❤️

Ingredients:
• 250g pasta
• 4 tomatoes
• 2 tablespoons olive oil
• 1 small onion (chopped)
• 2-3 cloves garlic (chopped)
• 1/2 cup cheddar cheese
• 2 tsp tomato puree
• Salt & black pepper
• 1 teaspoon oregano or Italian
seasoning
• 100ml double cream
• Fresh parsley (chopped)

#easyrecipeideas #easydinnerideas #quickfood #quickdinner #easyrecipe
